briefing: Markets were flat today (NASDAQ +0.3%, S&P500 +0.1%), a neutral session with no broad risk-on signal. AGX stood out from the screener with full multi-signal confirmation including a volume surge, so we added a single high-conviction position while leaving the rest of our open cash on the sidelines.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Volume confirmation means checking that a price move is backed by higher-than-usual trading volume, which suggests real institutional buying rather than a random blip. A stock rising on strong volume alongside other bullish signals (like MACD and RSI) is a much stronger buy signal than the same price move on light volume.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「成交量確認」是指價格變動伴隨著高於平常的成交量，顯示是真正的機構買盤，而非隨機波動。當股票在放量的同時，配合其他利好訊號（如MACD和RSI）一同上升，這比在淡靜成交量下的相同升幅更具參考價值，是更強的買入訊號。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices were essentially flat today, with the NASDAQ up 0.3% and the S&P 500 up 0.1%, reflecting a lack of strong directional catalysts in the session. Without major economic data or earnings surprises driving broad moves, trading stayed range-bound and stock-specific signals mattered more than macro themes. This kind of quiet, low-volatility day is common between major news events.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大市走勢平穩，納斯達克指數升0.3%，標普500指數升0.1%，反映市場缺乏強烈的方向性催化劑。由於沒有重大經濟數據或業績意外帶動大市，交投在區間內徘徊，個股訊號比宏觀主題更具參考價值。這種波動較低的平靜交易日在重大消息公佈之間頗為常見。

trades.reasoning: Only candidate with all four confirming signals (RSI bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, volume surge) plus top momentum score of 100, meeting the high-conviction bar even on an otherwise neutral market day.
